title: 校园场景：学习支持
method: 学习 -> 测验 -> 跟读 -> 通过后进入下一句
sources: Manual curation; school-life sentence patterns checked against common classroom and campus service usage.

units.phrase: Could you explain that again in a simpler way?
units.meaningZh: 你能用更简单的方式再解释一遍吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you explain that again in a simpler way? I understand the idea, but not the example.
units.exampleZh: 你能用更简单的方式再解释一遍吗？我理解这个想法，但没懂例子。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要只说 I don't understand。这样信息太少。加上 explain again 和 simpler way，老师更容易帮你。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合课堂、辅导课、线上课程中请求老师换一种方式解释。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文请老师用更简单的方式再解释一次。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you explain that again in a simpler way?

units.phrase: I want to make sure I understand the assignment correctly.
units.meaningZh: 我想确认自己正确理解了这个作业要求。
units.exampleEn: I want to make sure I understand the assignment correctly. Do we need to include references?
units.exampleZh: 我想确认自己正确理解了这个作业要求。我们需要包含参考文献吗？
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 I know homework right? assignment 比 homework 更适合大学或正式课程。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合问老师、助教或同学作业格式、提交要求、评分标准。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文说你想确认自己理解了作业要求。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I want to make sure I understand the assignment correctly.

units.phrase: When is the deadline for this project?
units.meaningZh: 这个项目的截止日期是什么时候？
units.exampleEn: When is the deadline for this project? I want to plan my work for the week.
units.exampleZh: 这个项目的截止日期是什么时候？我想安排这一周的学习计划。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 when finish this project。deadline 是截止日期，for this project 结构自然。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合课程项目、小组任务、论文草稿、申请材料等场景。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文问项目什么时候截止。
quiz.sampleAnswer: When is the deadline for this project?

units.phrase: Would it be possible to get a short extension?
units.meaningZh: 是否可以给我一个短期延期？
units.exampleEn: Would it be possible to get a short extension? I have been sick for two days.
units.exampleZh: 是否可以给我一个短期延期？我已经病了两天。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要直接说 give me more time。extension 是延期，would it be possible 更礼貌。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合真实有原因时向老师、助教、项目负责人申请延期。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文礼貌请求短期延期。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Would it be possible to get a short extension?

units.phrase: How should we divide the work?
units.exampleEn: How should we divide the work? I can prepare the slides if you handle the data.
units.exampleZh: 我们应该怎么分工？如果你处理数据，我可以准备幻灯片。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 how we split jobs。divide the work 是更自然的小组分工表达。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合小组作业、课堂项目、社团活动中讨论谁负责什么。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文问小组应该怎么分工。
quiz.sampleAnswer: How should we divide the work?

units.phrase: Could you help me find this book?
units.exampleEn: Could you help me find this book? The system says it is available, but I cannot see it on the shelf.
units.exampleZh: 你能帮我找这本书吗？系统显示可借，但我在书架上没看到。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 help me look book。find this book 是找这本书，on the shelf 是在书架上。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合图书馆、资料室、书店、校园服务台等场景。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文请图书馆工作人员帮你找书。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you help me find this book?

units.phrase: Could you give me some feedback on my draft?
units.meaningZh: 你能给我的草稿一些反馈吗？
units.exampleEn: Could you give me some feedback on my draft? I am not sure if the structure is clear.
units.exampleZh: 你能给我的草稿一些反馈吗？我不确定结构是否清楚。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要说 give me some advice to my draft。feedback on my draft 是固定搭配。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合论文、演讲稿、简历、项目报告等草稿阶段。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文请老师或同学给你的草稿反馈。
quiz.sampleAnswer: Could you give me some feedback on my draft?

units.phrase: I would like to add one point.
units.exampleEn: I would like to add one point. This example also shows how culture affects communication.
units.exampleZh: 我想补充一点。这个例子也说明文化如何影响沟通。
units.commonMistakeZh: 不要突然说 I say something。I would like to add one point 更适合课堂发言。
units.usageNoteZh: 适合课堂讨论、小组汇报、线上会议中自然插入观点。

quiz.promptZh: 用英文表达你想补充一点。
quiz.sampleAnswer: I would like to add one point.
